findings.title: Opt-in contradicts collector can silently invalidate existing higher-confidence edges on the same source->target pair
findings.recommendation: Skip auto contradicts when a valid caused/supports/enabled edge exists on the same pair, or do not invalidate manual/higher-strength edges from a low-strength auto inference, or surface an invalidated count; document the side effect in ADR + add a regression test.

findings.title: Handler forwards raw limit/threshold to backfill relying on collector-side clamp outside validated dispatch
findings.scopeProof: schema + handler + collector clamp sites cited
findings.recommendation: Awareness only; dual clamp (schema 1-100/1-2000 + collector) is currently safe.

findings.title: PRAGMA table_info interpolates table name (hardcoded-literal call sites only)
findings.recommendation: No action; ensure future callers never pass user-supplied table names through columnExists.

noveltyJustification: All three findings are new this dimension; SEC-001 (P1, weight 5) is the dominant signal and was missed by the prior 3-lens verify. weightedNew=5+1+1=7 over weightedTotal=7 => 1.0 raw, reported conservatively at 0.86 after accounting for SEC-002/003 being defense-in-depth/informational.
ruledOut: SQL injection in related_memories/supersession/limit scans (all parameterized)
